questions.question: What 1984 Rob Reiner movie, that followed a faux rock band, popularized the mockumentary-style filmmaking?
What 1985 best-selling Nintendo game used the NES Zapper to shoot birds?
Who sang the following lyrics? 'Oh yes, they call him the Streak; Fastest thing on two feet.'
Name the two dueling quarterbacks of the 70's Pittsburgh Steelers and the Dallas Cowboys.
Finish the jingle: 'Gimme a break, gimme a break, ___________.'
questions.answer: "break me off a piece of that Kit Kat bar"
